---
title: "About Me"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/onurfurkan
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/onurfgg
---

## Education

**B.S. in Industrial Engineering:** Hacettepe University (GPA: 3.17/4.00), 2022 - Present

**High School:** Abdülhamid Han Science High School (Grade: 94.14/100), 2018 - 2022

## Work Experience

**Advertising Manager** \| Dilkur Academy *July 2020 - Present* - Data-driven analysis of marketing strategies and customer data reporting via CRM. - Optimization of educational programs and instructor schedules using seasonal demand forecasting.

**İŞKUR Youth Program Participant** \| Hacettepe University Institute of Fine Arts *November 2025 - Present* - Management of administrative processes and operational coordination between academic units.

**İŞKUR Youth Program Participant** \| Hacettepe University Adult Hospital *January 2025 - June 2025* - Archive organization using "5S" principles and digital integration of large-scale patient data.

## Competencies

**Software & Tools:** Advanced Excel (Pivot, Solver, VBA), AutoCAD, MS Project, Minitab.

**Data Analytics:** Python, SQL, R, Quarto, Git.

**Certifications:** Six Sigma White Belt, SAP Integration Suite, Automotive Summer Camp Certificate of Success.

## Resume

You can review or download my up-to-date resume via the link below:

[Download My Resume (PDF)](onurfurkangok_cv.pdf)
